final:
module top_module(
    input clk, // clock input
    input reset, // synchronous reset input
    output reg [3:0] obf_count // 4-bit output
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        obf_count <= 4'b0000; // reset the counter to 0
    end else begin
        obf_count <= obf_count + 1; // increment the counter
    end
end

endmodule
